G1_api_coverage.detail: Unchanged. All 7 API endpoints covered by proxy routes.

G2_response_shape_accuracy.detail: Response body capture implemented via res.write()/res.end() interception in createLoggingMiddleware(). JSON responses parsed and shape extracted to depth 2 via extractShape(). Full body preserved for price APIs. Persisted to body-log.json (last 50 entries).
G2_response_shape_accuracy.residual_gap: Shape auto-comparison against real-site reference captures not yet implemented (runtime validation needed)

G3_price_calculation_accuracy.detail: Unchanged. Proxy passthrough preserves byte-identical responses. Now enhanced: full response body logged for price APIs.

G4_state_transition_coverage.detail: Unchanged. Pinia store tracking via index.html intact.

G5_session_stability.detail: Unchanged. Token auto-renewal and fallback mechanisms intact.
